name: cowork-pretooluse-shell-probe
description: Determines whether Cowork runs plugin-level PreToolUse hook commands through Windows cmd.exe (like SessionStart, proven via session-export) or a POSIX shell. Also tests whether the inline block pattern tool_input=$(cat); ... | grep -q X && echo '{block}' actually blocks the bash tool on Cowork. Observation is via session-export (PreToolUse stdout is not surfaced to context) plus the in-chat block/ran outcome.
